scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n app,bff,agent,adk -c auto "npm run dev:app" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:agent-adk"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -k -n mock,app,bff,agent,adk -c auto "npm run aimock:up" "USE_MOCK=1 npm run dev:app" "USE_MOCK=1 npm run dev:bff" "USE_MOCK=1 npm run dev:agent" "USE_MOCK=1 npm run dev:agent-adk"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @repo/bff && npm run build --workspace @repo/app
